# SPUNK.CODES — 300+ Free Developer Tools

> The largest free tool collection for developers, creators, and founders. 250+ free tools, 330 premium tools, 33 ebooks, 235 blog posts. No sign-up. No paywall. No BS. Built by one person with AI. Follow @SpunkArt13.

## Free Tools (206+, no sign-up required)

Every tool runs in the browser. No backend. No data collection. No accounts.

### Categories
- **Developer** — JSON formatter, API tester, code playground, regex tester, Git tools, Docker utilities (36+ tools)
- **Design** — Color palette generator, image compressor, CSS generators, gradient tools, font pairing (18+ tools)
- **SEO** — Meta tag generator, SEO audit checklist, schema markup, sitemap tools, keyword research (8+ tools)
- **Business** — Invoice generator, pitch deck builder, business plan tools, calculators, contract templates (22+ tools)
- **Social Media** — Tweet generators, hashtag tools, bio builders, content calendars, caption tools (16+ tools)
- **Creator** — Content planning, email templates, countdown tools, embed generators (16+ tools)
- **AI Tools** — AI writing assistant, prompt tools, automation workflows (3+ tools)
- **Utilities** — Password generator, PDF tools, analytics, security tools, conversion tools (9+ tools)
